Localization.Description: A user performed an action with an application resource

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed WAB resource "{object.name}" of "{object.type}" type on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} removed WAB resource "{object.name}" of "{object.type}" type on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created WAB resource "{object.name}" of "{object.type}" type on host {event_src.host}
